message:
Add batch iteration exports to eliminate O(N²) sequential access

- Add doc_array_elements/doc_object_keys: walk container once, return
  all child tape indices in a static 64KB batch buffer (16K entries)
- Update JS Proxy handlers to precompute indices via single WASM call
- Update deepMaterializeDoc to use batch reads
- Add generation-based tracking to prevent stale FinalizationRegistry
  callbacks from freeing reused document slots
- Add close()/Symbol.dispose for explicit document disposal in tight loops

Full-access benchmark: 7 ops/s → 55 ops/s (7.6x improvement).
Partial-access: 1.6-2x faster than JSON.parse across all patterns.
